name: deterministic-cognitive-infrastructure
description: Portable cognitive infrastructure plugin for AI agent harnesses. Provides bootstrap context, skills, routing, validation, readiness gates, and six-axis cognition.

harnesses: Any agent framework that can read files and inject bootstrap context

install.github: git clone https://github.com/Sigit-AP/Deterministic-Cognitive-Infrastructure.git && cd Deterministic-Cognitive-Infrastructure && npm install && npm test
install.download: Download ZIP, extract, run npm install, then npm test.
